Get palette colors

Source: R/palette_utils.R
get_palette.Rd

Get palette colors

Usage

get_palette(
  name = "gleam_discrete",
  n = 8,
  continuous = FALSE,
  reverse = FALSE
)

Arguments

name

Palette name.

n

Number of colors.

continuous

Whether to return continuous palette function output.

reverse

Reverse color order.

Value

Character color vector.

On this page
